title: DPRK / Pyongyang Metro
description:
Pyongyang Metro, DPRK, North Korea
The ticket costs 5 won (new exchange rate: 140 wong = 1 Euro), about 3.5 Cents Euro.
Other travelers told me that 3 stations are finished in old soviet Metro-luxury, the escalator is soviet-style too. We are not allowed to travel more than 2 stations. Are the other stations not finished? I get no answer from my guide.
